text:
(In reply to Jan Beich (mail not working) from comment #6)

Please see the description of attachment 174285, i.e top of this page.

Binaries of sbcl 1.2.7 cannot get make ferch in ports/math/sbcl,
so get by fetch on command line and copy them to ports/distfiles.
